channel.title: Managed Cloud on WECORE
channel.description: Recent content in Managed Cloud on WECORE

item.title: KaaS Explained: How Kubernetes-as-a-Service Helps Organizations Ship Faster
item.description: Kubernetes won the orchestration war for a reason: it gives teams a single, declarative way to run containers across any infrastructure. But running Kubernetes well is a different job from running software on Kubernetes. Someone has to patch etcd, plan version upgrades, watch the API server at 3am, and keep the control plane healthy through every node failure. That is the operational tax — and for most organizations it is pure overhead.
